scenario.title: Damage from unauthorized software modification
scenario.description: The iPhone ceased to function after the customer installed unauthorized third-party software that modified system behavior.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to an iPhone that has been modified to alter its functionality or capability without written permission of the manufacturer.
The Plan does not cover issues caused by third-party products or their effects on the Covered iPhone or software.

scenario.reasoning: The claim involves damage caused by unauthorized software modification, which is excluded under sections 4.2(iii) and 4.3(iii). Therefore, the Plan does not cover repair or replacement and no service fee applies.

persona.defining quirks: Enjoys tinkering with technology and gadgets
persona.detailed job description: Retired from a career in civil service
persona.education: 1 or more years of college credit, no degree
persona.household type: Married couple household, no children of the householder less than 18
persona.personal time: Spends free time in his garden or reading
persona.veteran status: On active duty in the past, but not now

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
The iPhone ceased to function after the customer installed unauthorized third-party software that modified system behavior.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):
{

  "serial_number": "GHT5R9P2L4K8",
  "phone_number": "+1-415-555-0198"
}

  },

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Do NOT give any information about whether the claim is covered or not. Your job is to gather the information only. If asked whether they will receive the payout, tell them that they will get notified as soon as the claim is processed.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hello. I have an iPhone 14 Pro Max and it just stopped working after I installed some software myself. I tinkered with it, though I guess it may not have been authorized. I'm hoping you can help me file a claim.
messages.raw_text: Hello. I have an iPhone 14 Pro Max and it just stopped working after I installed some software myself. I tinkered with it, though I guess it may not have been authorized. I'm hoping you can help me file a claim.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I can assist you with that. First, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone’s serial number? This is necessary to verify your coverage eligibility.
messages.raw_text: I can assist you with that. First, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone’s serial number? This is necessary to verify your coverage eligibility.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Certainly. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9876543210, and the serial number on my iPhone is GHT5R9P2L4K8.
messages.raw_text: Certainly. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9876543210, and the serial number on my iPhone is GHT5R9P2L4K8.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for that. Could you please describe the issue your iPhone is experiencing? For example, is it a hardware failure, screen damage, battery problem, or something else?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for that. Could you please describe the issue your iPhone is experiencing? For example, is it a hardware failure, screen damage, battery problem, or something else?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Well, after I installed that third-party software which changed how the phone’s system works, the iPhone simply stopped functioning. It won’t turn on or respond at all. Seems like a system failure of some sort. I haven’t dropped it or anything physical like that. I was trying to enhance its capabilities but it backfired.
messages.raw_text: Well, after I installed that third-party software which changed how the phone’s system works, the iPhone simply stopped functioning. It won’t turn on or respond at all. Seems like a system failure of some sort. I haven’t dropped it or anything physical like that. I was trying to enhance its capabilities but it backfired.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for the details. To assist further, may I know if your iPhone model is indeed the 14 Pro Max, and what iOS version it was running before the issue? Also, are there any peripherals or accessories currently attached, any error messages you saw, and have you tried any troubleshooting steps such as force restart or recovery mode?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for the details. To assist further, may I know if your iPhone model is indeed the 14 Pro Max, and what iOS version it was running before the issue? Also, are there any peripherals or accessories currently attached, any error messages you saw, and have you tried any troubleshooting steps such as force restart or recovery mode?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, it is the iPhone 14 Pro Max (256 GB), as I mentioned. I believe it was running the latest iOS update before I tried installing that software. No accessories were attached when this happened, and there were no error messages on the screen. I’ve tried force restarting it multiple times, but no luck. I haven’t tried recovery mode myself; it’s a bit complicated for me, but I can try if you think it might help.
messages.raw_text: Yes, it is the iPhone 14 Pro Max (256 GB), as I mentioned. I believe it was running the latest iOS update before I tried installing that software. No accessories were attached when this happened, and there were no error messages on the screen. I’ve tried force restarting it multiple times, but no luck. I haven’t tried recovery mode myself; it’s a bit complicated for me, but I can try if you think it might help.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the information. Given that this issue seems related to software modification, we will proceed with your claim based on the details you have provided. The claim will be processed, and you will receive notification as soon as it is complete. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the information. Given that this issue seems related to software modification, we will proceed with your claim based on the details you have provided. The claim will be processed, and you will receive notification as soon as it is complete. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that covers everything. I appreciate your help in getting this claim started. Please let me know if you need any further information from my side. Thank you very much. Have a good day.
messages.raw_text: No, that covers everything. I appreciate your help in getting this claim started. Please let me know if you need any further information from my side. Thank you very much. Have a good day.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: You’re very welcome. If we require any additional information, we will reach out to you. Have a great day, and take care!
messages.raw_text: You’re very welcome. If we require any additional information, we will reach out to you. Have a great day, and take care! <END>
